scripts.build: sed -i "s/INSERT_GEMINI_API_KEY_HERE/\$GEMINI_API_KEY/g" chat.js && sed -i "s/INSERT_EMAILJS_PUBLIC_KEY_HERE/\$EMAILJS_PUBLIC_KEY/g" script.js && sed -i "s/INSERT_EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID_HERE/\$EMAILJS_SERVICE_ID/g" script.js && sed -i "s/INSERT_EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID_HERE/\$EMAILJS_TEMPLATE_ID/g" script.js
